avoid.market: Will the Fed cut rates 0 times? (KXRATECUTCOUNT-26DEC31-T0)
avoid.reason: Passes volume/spread filters but no accessible current FOMC dots, SEP, or futures strip grounding without external data; fabricating a source is disallowed.

avoid.market: Will the Federal Reserve cut rates before 2027? (KXRATECUT-26DEC31)
avoid.reason: Near-inverse of zero-cut contract; same lack of verifiable live policy-path source; edge cannot be validated.
Volume OK but July CPI prints mid-August; no BLS nowcast or Cleveland Fed inflation nowcast retrievable in-session without tools.
Long-dated binary; NBER/BEA two-quarter rule through 2027 is too diffuse and ungroundable from supplied data alone.
Advance estimate due ~Jul 30; without Atlanta Fed GDPNow / Blue Chip tracking print, probability estimate would be unanchored.
All volume < $50K filter threshold; also require same-day NWS/CLI observations not supplied.
Nearly all volume < $50K or wide spreads; intraday spot not in feed; cannot mark fair value without price tape.

notes: Market-implied regime is neutral/modest-growth with sticky ~3.3% CPI and Fed on hold (zero 2026 cuts ~82.5% implied, Q2 GDP centered near 2%). Only five contracts clear volume>=50K and spread<=0.10. Rules forbid external retrieval and fabricated grounding sources; therefore no edge-qualified trades. Zero-trade outcome is intentional and correct under the prompt constraints.
